creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

If you haven’t been to Bok Tower Gardens before, you’re missing out on one of the most fairytale places in Florida and BONUS: It is dog friendly! 

Bok Tower Gardens
1151 Tower Blvd. 
Lake Wales, FL 
$20 admission for adults 
$10 extra to tour the inside of El Retiro 

#boktowergardens #thingstodoinflorida #floridahiddengems #floridabucketlist #botanicalgardensflorida

transcription.text: Did you know about this hidden gem in Florida that looks like it's straight out of a fairy tale? Welcome to Bock Tower Gardens, located in Lake Wales, which is in central Florida about an hour from Orlando. The showpiece of this 250-acre gardens is the stunning Singing Tower, which houses a carillon that plays music every 30 minutes. Take a listen. Bock Tower Gardens is perched atop Iron Mountain, which is one of the highest points in Florida. Bring some quarters so you can feed the fish that are waiting for you in this amazing lily pad pond. You'll also want to check out El Retiro, which is a 1930s historic mansion that you can walk around, and it's absolutely gorgeous. You can tour the inside for an additional cost. There's also a massive children's play area called Hammock Hollow, which even has a fairy garden, and let me tell you, the kids were having so much fun here. Also on site is an edible garden, and just look at these muscadine grapes. There are so many paved walking paths and off-the-beaten paths to explore with hidden spots. You'll also want to check out the cafe for a bite to eat, the cute shop, and museum at the Welcome Center. The garden is dog-friendly, which is a huge bonus for the dog lovers out there. Save this post and send it to a friend you would want to go here with, and follow for more Florida content from a local.
